summary: Iteration 121: Backend-only testing of Cascade Delete fix for CAM/Batch cleanup when deleting certificates. All 10 tests passed (100%). Verified: (1) DELETE /api/commesse/{cid}/documenti/{doc_id} correctly deletes document AND returns cascade info with CAM/Batch counts, (2) GET /api/cam/lotti?commessa_id={cid} correctly returns lotti_cam filtered by commessa, (3) POST /api/commesse/{cid}/documenti (cert upload) works correctly, (4) Cascade response JSON includes 'cascade' field with format 'CAM:N Batch:N Copie:N Archivio:N'.

cascade_deletes_cam_lotti.test: Verify CAM lotti deleted via source_doc_id strategy
cascade_deletes_cam_lotti.result: PASS - All linked lotti_cam records deleted

cascade_deletes_material_batches.test: Verify material_batches deleted via source_doc_id strategy
cascade_deletes_material_batches.result: PASS - All linked material_batches records deleted

cascade_nuke_orphans.test: When last cert deleted, all orphan CAM/batches cleaned

cam_lotti_filter.result: PASS - Returns {lotti: [...], total: N} filtered by commessa

preserve_other_cert_data.test: Delete cert A, verify cert B data preserved
preserve_other_cert_data.result: PASS - Deleting one cert does not affect other cert's CAM/batches

critical_code_review_comments: Backend delete_document endpoint at line 1450-1530 implements 3-strategy cascade delete: (1) by source_doc_id, (2) by colata numbers, (3) NUKE orphans when last cert deleted
Cascade info format 'CAM:N Batch:N Copie:N Archivio:N' allows frontend to display what was cleaned up
The fix in frontend (adding fetchCamData() call in handleDeleteDoc at line 666-672) cannot be verified via API, but backend correctly provides cascade info for frontend to refresh CAM section
seed_data_creation: Test fixtures create: (1) test user/session via MongoDB, (2) test commessa via API, (3) test certificates uploaded via API, (4) CAM lotti and material_batches inserted via MongoDB for cascade testing
test_credentials: Auto-generated test user sessions cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 backend tests pass for cascade delete functionality. The backend correctly: (1) deletes certificates, (2) cascade-deletes linked CAM lotti and material_batches, (3) returns cascade info in response for frontend feedback. The frontend fix (adding fetchCamData() in handleDeleteDoc) cannot be tested via API but is confirmed by code review.
